title: Ondo Finance Hires Ex-Invesco ETF Chief to Expand Onchain Investment Products
summary: Ondo Finance has hired John Hoffman, former Invesco ETF chief, to lead its push into onchain investment portfolios. This move signals a shift from tokenizing individual assets to offering full investment strategies on the blockchain.
body:
Ondo Finance, a blockchain-based financial platform, has hired John Hoffman, the former global head of ETFs at Invesco, to spearhead its expansion into onchain investment products. Hoffman will lead the development of full investment portfolios and strategies, moving beyond the company's current focus on tokenizing individual assets.

Hoffman brings over two decades of experience in traditional finance, including his recent role at Invesco, where he managed a portfolio of over $300 billion in assets. His expertise in exchange-traded funds (ETFs) and investment strategies is expected to help Ondo Finance bridge the gap between traditional finance and decentralized finance (DeFi).

This hire is significant for everyday investors as it could make complex investment strategies more accessible on the blockchain. By leveraging Hoffman's experience, Ondo Finance aims to create user-friendly, onchain products that offer diversification and professional management, potentially lowering the barrier to entry for retail investors.

Ondo Finance is not alone in this push. The broader trend of traditional finance professionals joining DeFi platforms highlights the growing convergence of traditional and decentralized finance. Investors should watch for new product announcements from Ondo Finance and similar platforms, as these could offer innovative ways to manage and grow their investments onchain.
twitterThread: Ondo Finance just hired John Hoffman, ex-Invesco ETF chief, to build onchain investment portfolios. This could change how you invest on the blockchain.
Hoffman managed $300B+ at Invesco. Now he's bringing that expertise to DeFi, creating full investment strategies onchain. Big move.

What does this mean for you? Potentially easier access to diversified, professionally managed investments on the blockchain. Watch for new product announcements from Ondo.
